coinflip_challenges_resolution_check.name: coinflip_challenges_resolution_check
coinflip_challenges_resolution_check.value: ("coinflip_challenges"."status" = 'pending' and "coinflip_challenges"."outcome" is null and "coinflip_challenges"."winner_id" is null and "coinflip_challenges"."resolved_at" is null) or ("coinflip_challenges"."status" = 'completed' and "coinflip_challenges"."outcome" is not null and "coinflip_challenges"."winner_id" is not null and "coinflip_challenges"."resolved_at" is not null) or ("coinflip_challenges"."status" in ('declined', 'expired') and "coinflip_challenges"."outcome" is null and "coinflip_challenges"."winner_id" is null and "coinflip_challenges"."resolved_at" is not null)
